title: Entrepreneur 2025 in full swing
description: LOCAL NEWS - The third edition of the...
bodyText:
LOCAL NEWS - The third edition of the Airports Company South Africa Entrepreneur 2025 programme, presented and managed by the George Business Chamber, is in full swing at the Nelson Mandela University George Campus.

Twenty-one finalists are participating in the programme, and nine mentors and five Corporate Identity (CI) specialists will support them throughout the period, with the prizegiving and exhibition at the end of October.

The programme is privileged to have excellent mentors and CI specialists this year, each bringing a unique blend of experience across sectors and disciplines.

Paul Hoffman of H2P Project Management, is the project manager of the local Entrepreneur 2025.

The group photo shows Donald Hjul (H&H Services), Marshall Grant (Garden Route Innovation and Technology Hub), Maleane Life Malesa (Reneilink), Robert Berry (Manor Marketing Consultancy), Rikus Coetzee (SolveEdge Solutions), Dr Santie von Below (Fundtech Consulting), Alwyn H Janse van Rensburg (Formosa Consulting), Ina Le Roux (Ina le Roux Consulting) and Wajdi Abrahams (VKC Agency).

Previous article:

The Entrepreneur 2025 launches in George

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
